title: Surface coverage
caption: FIG. 3. Development of the surface coverage with time. Circles represent the fully numerical solution of differential equations and lines the result of the approximate model. Parameter values used: H ¼ 0.5 l m , W ¼ 0.1 mm, p A0 ¼ 100Pa, M A ¼ 0.0749 kg/mol, d A ¼ 591pm, M B ¼ 0.028 kg/mol, d B ¼ 374 pm, p B ¼ 300Pa, q ¼ 5 /C2 10 18 m /C0 2 , T ¼ 500 K, K ¼ 100Pa /C0 1 , c ¼ 0.01, and gpc sat ¼ 106pm.
